query: Count all 1 km grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to those intersecting Kristiansand municipality

5.description: find grid cells that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: keep only grid cell id to prepare deduplication

7.description: deduplicate grid ids (one row per grid cell)

8.description: count distinct grid cells intersecting 200-year storm-surge areas in Kristiansand

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km;
